verdict: The chart is severely undermined by incorrect structural mapping, leaving the actual 15-second drop completely flat while misplaced syncopations clutter the outro.

issues.problem: The musical drop begins here, but the chart fails to increase density or intensity, continuing the exact same slow pace as the quiet intro.
Misaligned section definitions place the 'drop' at the very end during the outro transition, resulting in awkward syncopations when the music is actually winding down.
Endless, mindless repetition of the same lane rotation (BAR -> NOTE -> GAP) that ignores the actual melodic pitch and shape.
A 1.5-beat hold note is placed on a short synth pluck that has no musical sustain, making the hold feel empty and unrewarding.
